text: 🌍 Join the Global Voice Network 🌍 A worldwide community of Telegram channels bringing you verified news in multiple languages. ✨ What we offer: 🔴 Breaking News – Instant updates from across the globe 🔴 Geopolitics – Deep coverage of world regions & developments 🔴 Analysis & Insight – Political, military, and strategic perspectives 🔴 Multilingual Access – News and discussions in Arabic, English, Persian, Spanish & more 📢 Because the world speaks many voices – and we bring them together. 🔈 Stay informed, stay connected, stay global: Join Here
text_zh: 🌍 加入全球之声网络 🌍 一个汇集了全球 Telegram 频道的社区，为您提供多种语言的核实新闻。✨ 我们提供：🔴 突发新闻 – 来自全球的即时更新 🔴 地缘政治 – 对世界各地区及事态发展的深度报道 🔴 分析与洞察 – 政治、军事和战略视角 🔴 多语言访问 – 阿拉伯语、英语、波斯语、西班牙语等语言的新闻与讨论 📢 因为世界有许多声音——而我们将它们汇聚在一起。 🔈 保持知情，保持联系，保持全球化：点击此处加入

text: 🔄 Forwarded from ResistanceTrench mirror: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 The high-ranking delegation of the Islamic Republic of Iran, left Islamabad a few hours ago heading to Iran.
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 ResistanceTrench 镜像：🇮🇷 🇵🇰 伊朗伊斯兰共和国高级代表团已于几小时前离开伊斯兰堡，启程返回伊朗。

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 "Look at the Israeli relationship, look at the incredible partnership we have. As Bibi Netanyahu said, we’re the big brother and Israel is the little brother." - Trump 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 “看看以色列的关系，看看我们拥有的令人难以置信的伙伴关系。正如比比·内塔尼亚胡所说，我们是老大哥，以色列是小弟弟。” - 特朗普 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump: We can cut off their electricity for 10 years.
text_zh: 特朗普：我们可以切断他们的电力长达 10 年。

text: ↩️ Reply to Lebanese News and Updates: "‘I could take out Iran in one day. One hour.’" فَقَالَ أَنَا رَبُّكُمُ الْأَعْلَىٰ (24) فَأَخَذَهُ اللَّهُ نَكَالَ الْآخِرَةِ وَالْأُولَىٰ (25) إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَعِبْرَةً لِّمَن يَخْشَىٰ (26) أَأَنتُمْ أَشَدُّ خَلْقًا أَمِ السَّمَاءُ ۚ بَنَاهَا (27) رَفَعَ سَمْكَهَا فَسَوَّاهَا (28) وَأَغْطَشَ لَيْلَهَا وَأَخْرَجَ ضُحَاهَا (29) وَالْأَرْضَ بَعْدَ ذَٰلِكَ دَحَاهَا (30) أَخْرَجَ مِنْهَا مَاءَهَا وَمَرْعَاهَا (31) وَالْجِبَالَ أَرْسَاهَا (32) مَتَاعًا لَّكُمْ وَلِأَنْعَامِكُمْ
text_zh: ↩️ 回复黎巴嫩新闻与更新：“‘我可以在一天之内消灭伊朗。一小时。’” (此处包含古兰经经文，意为：他说：“我是你们的至尊的主。” 于是，真主惩治了他，使他受后世和今世的刑罚。对于敬畏者，此中确有一种教训。你们是被造的，还是天是被造的？真主曾建造了天，他升起天的穹窿，并使它均衡。他使天的夜昏暗，并使它的昼光明。此后，他将大地展开，他使大地涌出水来，生出牧草来。他使山峦稳固。这些都是为了你们和你们的牲畜的利益。)

text: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 The high-ranking delegation of the Islamic Republic of Iran, left Islamabad a few hours ago heading to Iran.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 伊朗伊斯兰共和国高级代表团已于几小时前离开伊斯兰堡，启程返回伊朗。

text: Trump: We can cut off their electricity for 10 years.
text_zh: 特朗普：我们可以切断他们的电力长达 10 年。

text: 🇺🇸 "NATO is shameful" - Trump 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 “北约是可耻的” - 特朗普 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Trump on Iran: I could take out Iran in one day. I took out one bridge just to show them because they went public with a statement that wasn't true. State Terrorism
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 特朗普谈伊朗：我可以在一天之内消灭伊朗。我摧毁了一座桥梁只是为了向他们展示，因为他们公开了一份不真实的声明。国家恐怖主义

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇪🇺 U.S. President Trump called NATO “shameful”, saying allies were not there for the United States during the war with Iran. He singled out UK Prime Minister Starmer for saying Britain would send equipment after the war: “That’s a Neville Chamberlain…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump said the US has “wiped out their whole country, essentially”, adding that the only remaining targets in Iran are water desalination plants, electric generating plants, bridges and some missile manufacturing facilities. “We could hit them. We could have them all down. You couldn’t have electricity for ten years,” he said. “When you talk about maximum, I think I pretty much maxed out.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇪🇺 美国总统特朗普称北约“可耻”，称盟友在与伊朗的战争期间没有支持美国。他特别点名英国首相斯塔默，因为他表示英国将在战后派遣装备：“那是一种内维尔·张伯伦式的言论……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普表示，美国已经“基本上摧毁了他们的整个国家”，并补充说伊朗境内仅存的目标是海水淡化厂、发电厂、桥梁和一些导弹制造设施。“我们可以打击他们。我们可以让他们全部瘫痪。你们将十年没有电，”他说。“当谈到极限时，我想我已经差不多达到极限了。” @wfwitness

text: Maria Bartiromo: Do you believe the price of oil and gas will be lower before the midterm elections? Trump: It could be the same or a little bit higher; it should be around the same.
text_zh: 玛丽亚·巴蒂罗莫：你认为石油和天然气的价格会在中期选举前下降吗？特朗普：可能会保持不变或稍微高一点；应该差不多。

text: 🇺🇸 "I hear news reports about China giving the shoulder missiles. I doubt they would do that because I have a relationship and I think they wouldn't do that, but maybe they did a little bit at the beginning, but I don't think they would anymore. But if we catch them doing that they get a 50% tariff." - Trump 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 “我听到有关中国提供肩扛式导弹的新闻报道。我怀疑他们会这样做，因为我有这种关系，我认为他们不会这样做，也许他们在开始时做了一点，但我认为他们不会再这样做了。但如果我们抓到他们这样做，他们将面临 50% 的关税。” - 特朗普 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump on NATO: We have to reexamine NATO. They weren't there for us. They won't be there for us. This is just a military operation, not a hard thing for us.
text_zh: 特朗普谈北约：我们必须重新审视北约。他们没有支持我们。他们也不会支持我们。这只是一次军事行动，对我们来说不是什么难事。

text: Trump compares Keir Starmer to Neville Chamberlain.
text_zh: 特朗普将基尔·斯塔默比作内维尔·张伯伦。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇻🇪 U.S. President Trump said he rebuilt the US military in his first term and is now using it in his second term. “We have the greatest military anywhere in the world. We have the greatest equipment in the world.” He also noted that Venezuela is making…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇪🇺 U.S. President Trump called NATO “shameful”, saying allies were not there for the United States during the war with Iran. He singled out UK Prime Minister Starmer for saying Britain would send equipment after the war: “That’s a Neville Chamberlain type of statement.” He also criticised Germany for saying it didn’t start the war. “Now we have to reexamine NATO because they weren’t there for us,” Trump said. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇻🇪 美国总统特朗普表示，他在第一个任期内重建了美国军队，现在正在第二个任期内使用它。“我们拥有世界上任何地方最强大的军队。我们拥有世界上最伟大的装备。” 他还指出，委内瑞拉正在赚取……的钱” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇪🇺 美国总统特朗普称北约“可耻”，称盟友在与伊朗的战争期间没有支持美国。他特别点名英国首相斯塔默，因为他表示英国将在战后派遣装备：“那是一种内维尔·张伯伦式的言论。” 他还批评德国称其没有发动战争。“现在我们必须重新审视北约，因为他们没有支持我们，”特朗普说。 @wfwitness

text: — ❗️ 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 President Trump: ‘I could take out Iran in one day. One hour.’ @Middle_East_Spectator
text_zh: — ❗️ 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 特朗普总统：‘我可以在一天之内消灭伊朗。一小时。’ @Middle_East_Spectator

text: Trump: Chinese cars are destroying Europe because they are taking away business from Mercedes and BMW. We don’t have any Chinese cars in our country.
text_zh: 特朗普：中国汽车正在摧毁欧洲，因为它们抢走了梅赛德斯和宝马的生意。我们国家没有任何中国汽车。

text: Trump: Chinese cars are destroying Europe because they are taking away business from Mercedes and BMW. We don’t have any Chinese cars in our country.
text_zh: 特朗普：中国汽车正在摧毁欧洲，因为它们抢走了梅赛德斯和宝马的生意。我们国家没有任何中国汽车。

text: Trump on NATO countries: Could I have forced them to participate? Maybe. But if they had come in, it would have been grudgingly. They would have stayed behind.
text_zh: 特朗普谈北约国家：我能强迫他们参与吗？也许。但如果他们加入，那也是勉强的。他们会留在后面。

text: Maria Bartiromo: You said the other day that any country that supports Iran or sends military equipment to Iran would face a 50% tariff on their products. Were you referring to China? Trump: Yes, China and potentially others. But specifically, yes, China is included. I’ve heard reports — and I don’t always trust news reports — claiming that China giving shoulder-fired anti-aircraft missiles. I’m not sure that’s accurate. I doubt they would do that. Maybe they did a little bit at the beginning. But if we catch any country, including China, providing military equipment to Iran, they will face a 50% tariff.
text_zh: 玛丽亚·巴蒂罗莫：你前几天说，任何支持伊朗或向伊朗运送军事装备的国家都将面临 50% 的产品关税。你指的是中国吗？特朗普：是的，中国以及其他潜在国家。但具体来说，是的，中国包括在内。我听到过报道——我并不总是相信新闻报道——声称中国正在提供肩扛式防空导弹。我不确定这是否准确。我怀疑他们会这样做。也许他们在开始时做了一点。但如果我们抓到任何国家，包括中国，提供军事装备给伊朗，他们将面临 50% 的关税。

text: ↩️ Reply to Clash Report: "Trump:The Strait is critical for Japan — they get about 93% of their oil through it. South Korea gets roughly 45%. Yet these countries haven’t really helped us.I ask them: are you going to help?We have about 45,000 U.S. troops in Japan and about 50,000 in South Korea. We guard them and protect them. But when we ask for a little help in return, they don’t help us." Imagine after all what he did and all what he can do and all the power under his command and the Israelis and he still talks about help Know what exactly that is for? Not for military means which he possess enough off to do anything he wants but? For the legitimacy of war and action that he is looking for and can't secure because no one is helping supporting his fully And found out he's only working with the small bastard nation of Israel, a pariah for the past few years.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Clash Report：“特朗普：海峡对日本至关重要——他们约 93% 的石油通过该海峡。韩国约 45%。然而这些国家并没有真正帮助我们。我问他们：你们会帮忙吗？我们在日本有约 45,000 名美军，在韩国有约 50,000 名。我们守卫并保护他们。但当我们要求一点回报时，他们却不帮我们。” 想象一下，在他所做的一切、他能做的一切以及他指挥下的所有力量，还有以色列人之后，他仍然在谈论帮助。知道这到底是为了什么吗？不是为了军事手段，因为他拥有足够的军事手段去做他想做的任何事情，而是为了他正在寻求且无法确保的战争和行动的合法性，因为没有人完全支持他。结果发现他只与那个小混蛋国家以色列合作，一个过去几年里的贱民。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇨🇳🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump said that if China supplies military equipment to Iran, including shoulder‑fired anti‑aircraft missiles, it would face a 50% tariff on its products. “If we catch them doing that, they get a 50% tariff, which is a staggering…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇻🇪 U.S. President Trump said he rebuilt the US military in his first term and is now using it in his second term. “We have the greatest military anywhere in the world. We have the greatest equipment in the world.” He also noted that Venezuela is making more money than ever before and that the United States is participating in those profits. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇨🇳🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普表示，如果中国向伊朗提供军事装备，包括肩扛式防空导弹，其产品将面临 50% 的关税。“如果我们抓到他们这样做，他们将面临 50% 的关税，这是一个惊人的……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇻🇪 美国总统特朗普表示，他在第一个任期内重建了美国军队，现在正在第二个任期内使用它。“我们拥有世界上任何地方最强大的军队。我们拥有世界上最伟大的装备。” 他还指出，委内瑞拉赚的钱比以往任何时候都多，而美国正在分享这些利润。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇮🇷⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇱 Two empty crude tankers attempted to make their way through the Strait of Hormuz and into the Persian Gulf on Sunday, only to make last-minute U-turns just as peace negotiations between the US and Iran broke down. The tankers, Agios Fanourios I and…" 🇮🇷 2 more oil tankers have turned back from the Strait of Hormuz - Fars Pakistani-flagged tankers “Khairpur” and “Shalamar,” reported earlier to be heading toward the strait, have made a 180-degree turn and are now returning.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench 镜像：“🇮🇷⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇱 两艘空油轮周日试图穿过霍尔木兹海峡进入波斯湾，但就在美伊和平谈判破裂时，它们在最后一刻掉头。这些油轮，Agios Fanourios I 和……” 🇮🇷 又有 2 艘油轮从霍尔木兹海峡掉头 - 法尔斯通讯社报道，早些时候据称正驶向海峡的巴基斯坦籍油轮“Khairpur”和“Shalamar”已掉头 180 度，目前正在返回。

text: 🇺🇸 "I was thinking about calling it the Gulf of Trump, and I decided not to do it." - Trump 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 “我曾考虑将其命名为特朗普湾，但我决定不这样做。” - 特朗普 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇨🇳 U.S. President Trump said China can send its ships to the United States or to Venezuela. “We told them, buy from Venezuela. We have a lot of overcapacity, we’d sell them, and we’ll probably sell it for even less money.” Trump added that he has a…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump said that if China supplies military equipment to Iran, including shoulder‑fired anti‑aircraft missiles, it would face a 50% tariff on its products. “If we catch them doing that, they get a 50% tariff, which is a staggering amount,” he said. Trump added that he doubts China would do so because of his relationship with President Xi. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇨🇳 美国总统特朗普表示，中国可以将其船只派往美国或委内瑞拉。“我们告诉他们，从委内瑞拉购买。我们有大量的过剩产能，我们会卖给他们，而且我们可能会以更低的价格出售。” 特朗普补充说，他有一个……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普表示，如果中国向伊朗提供军事装备，包括肩扛式防空导弹，其产品将面临 50% 的关税。“如果我们抓到他们这样做，他们将面临 50% 的关税，这是一个惊人的数额，”他说。特朗普补充说，由于他与习近平主席的关系，他怀疑中国会这样做。 @wfwitness

text: Trump on gas and oil prices: Eventually, prices will go down. It may not happen immediately, but once this situation is resolved, prices will fall. If you want to see the stock market collapse, let a couple of nuclear bombs be used — whether against us or anywhere else.
text_zh: 特朗普谈天然气和石油价格：最终，价格会下降。这可能不会立即发生，但一旦这种情况得到解决，价格就会下跌。如果你想看到股市崩盘，就让几枚核弹被使用吧——无论是针对我们还是其他任何地方。

text: Journalist Jad Ghosn: "There are Lebanese political parties who wouldn't mind even a slight loss of land if Israel gets rid of Hezbullah for them..."
text_zh: 记者贾德·戈斯恩：“有些黎巴嫩政党甚至不介意失去一点土地，只要以色列能为他们除掉真主党……”

text: Trump: The Strait is critical for Japan — they get about 93% of their oil through it. South Korea gets roughly 45%. Yet these countries haven’t really helped us. I ask them: are you going to help? We have about 45,000 U.S. troops in Japan and about 50,000 in South Korea. We guard them and protect them. But when we ask for a little help in return, they don’t help us.
text_zh: 特朗普：海峡对日本至关重要——他们约 93% 的石油通过该海峡。韩国约 45%。然而这些国家并没有真正帮助我们。我问他们：你们会帮忙吗？我们在日本有约 45,000 名美军，在韩国有约 50,000 名。我们守卫并保护他们。但当我们要求一点回报时，他们却不帮我们。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump said the United States must stop Iran from obtaining a nuclear weapon. “You want to see a stock market go down? Let a couple of nuclear bombs be dropped on us, or frankly, any place else,” he warned. He noted that the stock market…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 U.S. President Trump said China can send its ships to the United States or to Venezuela. “We told them, buy from Venezuela. We have a lot of overcapacity, we’d sell them, and we’ll probably sell it for even less money.” Trump added that he has a very good relationship with President Xi and that “they’re paying us substantial money – we’ve never got money before.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普表示，美国必须阻止伊朗获得核武器。“你想看到股市下跌吗？让几枚核弹投在我们身上，或者坦率地说，投在任何其他地方，”他警告说。他指出，股市……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 美国总统特朗普表示，中国可以将其船只派往美国或委内瑞拉。“我们告诉他们，从委内瑞拉购买。我们有大量的过剩产能，我们会卖给他们，而且我们可能会以更低的价格出售。” 特朗普补充说，他与习近平主席关系非常好，而且“他们正在支付给我们大量的钱——我们以前从未得到过钱。” @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Bartiromo: Do you believe the price of oil and gas will be lower before the midterm elections? Trump: I hope so. I mean, I think so, it could be. It could be the same or maybe a little bit higher. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043338662876717084/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报巴蒂罗莫：你认为石油和天然气的价格会在中期选举前下降吗？特朗普：我希望如此。我的意思是，我认为会，可能会。可能会保持不变或稍微高一点。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043338662876717084/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel MUST WATCH 🔴 President Trump on Iran: “They haven’t left the bargaining table. I predict they come back and they give us everything we want. I want everything. I don’t want 90%, I don’t want 95%. I told my people I want everything!” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043338231240859898/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报必看 🔴 特朗普总统谈伊朗：“他们还没有离开谈判桌。我预测他们会回来，并给我们想要的一切。我想要一切。我不想要 90%，我不想要 95%。我告诉我的团队，我想要一切！” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043338231240859898/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel NOW 🔴 PRESIDENT TRUMP: “IF I CATCH CHINA GIVING IRAN ARMS, IT'D GET 50% TARIFF” tweet
text_zh: 开源情报现在 🔴 特朗普总统：“如果我抓到中国向伊朗提供武器，它将面临 50% 的关税” 推文

text: Open Source Intel President Trump: "In one half of a day, they wouldn't have ONE bridge standing. They wouldn't have ONE electric generating plant standing. And they're back in the stone ages. I'd rather not do that!" "But I do believe they're going to come to the table on this because nobody can be so stupid as to say that we want to have nuclear weapons." "I could take out Iran in one day. I could take down in one in one hour." "I could have their entire energy, everything, every one of their plants, their electric generating plants, which is a big deal." "And I hate to do it because if I do it, it takes you 10 years to rebuild. They'll never be able to rebuild it." "And the other thing you take out of the bridges. I took out one just to show them because they went public with a statement that wasn't true. They admitted it." "I say, I'm going to take out a bridge. And I took out a bridge. And that was the end of that. Now they've been really behaving quite well." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报特朗普总统：“在半天之内，他们就不会有一座桥梁屹立不倒。他们就不会有一座发电厂屹立不倒。他们会回到石器时代。我宁愿不这样做！” “但我确实相信他们会就此坐到谈判桌前，因为没有人会愚蠢到说我们想要拥有核武器。” “我可以在一天之内消灭伊朗。我可以在一小时内摧毁它。” “我可以摧毁他们的整个能源，一切，他们的每一座工厂，他们的发电厂，这可是件大事。” “我讨厌这样做，因为如果我做了，你需要 10 年才能重建。他们永远无法重建它。” “另一件事是你摧毁桥梁。我摧毁了一座只是为了向他们展示，因为他们公开了一份不真实的声明。他们承认了。” “我说，我要摧毁一座桥。我就摧毁了一座桥。事情就这样结束了。现在他们表现得相当好。” 推文

text: OSINTtechnical Trump: "If we find that China is giving [Iran] anti-aircraft missiles... we are going to tariff them 50%." tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 特朗普：“如果我们发现中国正在向[伊朗]提供防空导弹……我们将对他们征收 50% 的关税。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel President Trump: “We have new machinery to kill the drones, the computerized bullets, they call that. Also lasers melt the drone; it’s a beautiful thing to see.” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043336914191679741/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报特朗普总统：“我们有新的机器来摧毁无人机，他们称之为计算机化子弹。还有激光可以熔化无人机；这是一种美丽的景象。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043336914191679741/video/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇭🇺 🗳️ 🗣️ Péter Magyar said that the entire Tisza community and millions of supporters are calmly and confidently waiting for polling stations to close. 📌 He stated that turnout data throughout the day confirms what they already knew, calling the election a historic moment for Hungary. 📌 Magyar dismissed claims of potential post-election unrest as fear-driven narratives and falsehoods promoted by Fidesz, even suggesting such ideas resemble influence from Russian consultants. 📌 He described these reports as desperate provocations and misinformation. 📌 Addressing citizens, he said the country is living through the final hours of Orbán’s rule and urged people to move forward with calm and dignity, aiming to reunite the nation afterward. 📌 He called on those who haven’t yet voted to go to polling stations before 19:00 and encourage others to participate, stressing that every vote matters. 📌 “God bless Hungary!” See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇭🇺 🗳️ 🗣️ 彼得·马贾尔表示，整个蒂萨社区和数百万支持者正冷静而自信地等待投票站关闭。 📌 他指出，全天的投票率数据证实了他们已经知道的事情，称这次选举是匈牙利的历史性时刻。 📌 马贾尔驳斥了关于选举后可能出现动荡的说法，称其为青民盟推动的恐惧驱动的叙事和谎言，甚至暗示这种想法类似于俄罗斯顾问的影响。 📌 他将这些报道描述为绝望的挑衅和虚假信息。 📌 他向公民发表讲话，称国家正在经历欧尔班统治的最后几个小时，并敦促人们冷静而有尊严地前进，旨在之后重新团结国家。 📌 他呼吁那些尚未投票的人在 19:00 前前往投票站并鼓励他人参与，强调每一票都很重要。 📌 “上帝保佑匈牙利！” 与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Open Source Intel REPORTER: If they don't agree, is that the plan? Will you further destruct Iran? TRUMP: "YEAH, I will. If they don't give that plan up, yeah!" https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043336355715899759/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报记者：如果他们不同意，这就是计划吗？你会进一步摧毁伊朗吗？特朗普：“是的，我会。如果他们不放弃那个计划，是的！” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043336355715899759/video/1 推文

text: U.S. Central Command U.S. Army Soldiers perform maintenance on a Patriot mobile interceptor missile system in the Middle East. https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2043336077734257131/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部美国陆军士兵在中东对爱国者移动拦截导弹系统进行维护。https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2043336077734257131/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTtechnical Trump on gas prices: Could be lower before [the midterms], could be higher tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 特朗普谈天然气价格：可能在[中期选举]前下降，也可能更高 推文

text: Open Source Intel President Trump: "I was thinking about calling it the Gulf of Trump, and I decided not to do it. I think that one maybe wouldn't have worked out. I'm not so sure. But I was thinking about it's gonna be called the Gulf of Trump." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043335761244692859/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报特朗普总统：“我曾考虑将其命名为特朗普湾，但我决定不这样做。我想那个可能行不通。我不确定。但我曾考虑过它将被命名为特朗普湾。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043335761244692859/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: Social media post about wiping out Iranian civilization brought Iran to the table. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报特朗普：关于摧毁伊朗文明的社交媒体帖子让伊朗坐到了谈判桌前。 推文

text: OSINTtechnical Trump on Iran's nuclear program: "You want to see a stock market that goes down, let a couple of nuclear bombs get dropped on us." tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 特朗普谈伊朗核计划：“你想看到股市下跌吗，让几枚核弹投在我们身上。” 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) Iranian state media releases footage of Iranian navy servicemen engaging in radio communications with the U.S. Navy Arleigh Burke-class destroyer USS Frank E. Petersen Jr. while it is sailing through the Strait of Hormuz. An Iranian serviceman issues what is meant to be the "last warning" to the warship and later says that it ready to open fire on it, though no kinetic action of any kind is seen in the video. tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）伊朗官方媒体发布了伊朗海军军人在霍尔木兹海峡航行时与美国海军阿利·伯克级驱逐舰“弗兰克·E·彼得森”号进行无线电通信的画面。一名伊朗军人向军舰发出了所谓的“最后警告”，随后表示准备向其开火，尽管视频中没有看到任何形式的动能行动。 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: “won’t let Iran make money selling oil to those it likes” tweet
text_zh: 开源情报特朗普：“不会让伊朗通过向它喜欢的人出售石油来赚钱” 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump on Iran: "They came in like they had the cards, but they don't have the cards. Their army and their whole military is obliterated. The whole place is obliterated." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043335164776813057/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报特朗普谈伊朗：“他们进来时好像手里有牌，但他们根本没有牌。他们的军队和整个军事力量都被消灭了。整个地方都被消灭了。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043335164776813057/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: As Bibi Netanyahu said, we're the big brother and they're the small brother. It's been a very effective team. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043334836337705308/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报特朗普：正如比比·内塔尼亚胡所说，我们是老大哥，他们是小弟弟。这是一个非常有效的团队。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043334836337705308/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel SUDAN: Human Rights Watch reports that Sudanese Armed Forces and allied units are carrying out widespread arbitrary detentions, torture, and abuse of civilians in areas under their control, actions that may amount to war crimes. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043334747334603028/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报苏丹：人权观察组织报告称，苏丹武装部队及其盟军正在其控制区对平民进行大规模任意拘留、酷刑和虐待，这些行为可能构成战争罪。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043334747334603028/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: "We didn't get there on the important issue. They want to have nuclear weapons. They're not going to have nuclear weapons." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043334414554329426/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报特朗普：“我们在重要问题上没有达成一致。他们想要拥有核武器。他们不会拥有核武器。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043334414554329426/video/1 推文

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 I could take out Iran in ONE DAY. In ONE HOUR but I HATE TO DO IT
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 我可以在一天之内消灭伊朗。在一小时内，但我讨厌这样做
